creator: pi@opsec.eu
text:
Hi!

Upgrade to 2.17.8:

diff -r -u databases/cego/Makefile /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile
--- databases/cego/Makefile	2013-03-25 23:24:34.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/Makefile	2013-04-12 11:13:30.000000000 +0200
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: head/databases/cego/Makefile 315238 2013-03-25 16:54:48Z culot $
 
 PORTNAME=	cego
-PORTVERSION=	2.17.5
+PORTVERSION=	2.17.8
 CATEGORIES=	databases
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.lemke-it.com/
 
diff -r -u databases/cego/distinfo /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo
--- databases/cego/distinfo	2013-03-25 23:24:34.000000000 +0100
+++ /usr/home/pi/myp/databases/cego/distinfo	2013-04-12 11:13:32.000000000 +0200
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (cego-2.17.5.tar.gz) = 51f1e75e2933334fc97d656786735d4eb8e6006e54ba71451befc56159654dfd
-SIZE (cego-2.17.5.tar.gz) = 1116702
+SHA256 (cego-2.17.8.tar.gz) = e29267ed4b7177ebe154a310e5e578224a710fa63dfbf0fd8feb81559081f55a
